ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "top_length" REAL /* Top length measurement in inches */,
  "bottom_length" REAL /* Bottom length measurement in inches */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is for (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Regular, Petite, Tall) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is for (e.g., Adult, Children, Infant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the garment belongs to (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the garment was released */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Collection the garment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the garment (i.e., when to trigger a reorder) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the garment (i.e., how many to order) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_items" (
  "shipment_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment item */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_items_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_items_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)
